printed.name: Step Down Back
printed.setup: Standing upright facing Wunda Chair, one foot on Wunda Chair, leg bent, knee aligned over ankle, thigh parallel to Mat, other foot placed on pedal, plantarflexed, leg straight, arms crossed in front body, trunk flat on diagonal line, pedal hovering

movement.inhale: Straighten back leg, lowering pedal, return to start position

cues: Keep knee aligned over ankle (as close as possible)
